auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Veriphone API key sent with the Authorization Bearer header. Sign up and manage your key from the control panel via https://veriphone.io/docs.

actions.name: get_credits
actions.description: Retrieve the current Veriphone verification credit summary for the account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving the current Veriphone credit summary.

status.description: The response status returned by Veriphone.

credits.description: The remaining verification credits on the account.

total_verified_phone_numbers.description: The cumulative number of verified phone numbers on the account.

active.description: Whether the Veriphone account is active.

email.description: The account email returned by Veriphone.

country.description: The account country returned by Veriphone.

counter.description: The account counter value returned by Veriphone.

outputSchema.description: The current credit summary returned by Veriphone.

actions.name: verify_phone_number
actions.description: Verify whether a phone number is valid and return its carrier and region data.

phone.description: The phone number to verify in E.164 or another commonly used format.

default_country.description: The optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used to interpret local numbers.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for verifying a phone number with Veriphone.

status.description: The response status returned by Veriphone.

phone.description: The phone number echoed back by Veriphone.

phone_valid.description: Whether Veriphone considers the phone number valid.

phone_type.description: The detected line type, such as mobile or landline.

phone_region.description: The detected region or area associated with the phone number.

country_code.description: The detected ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

international_number.description: The international presentation of the phone number.

e164.description: The E.164 representation of the phone number.

carrier.description: The detected carrier name, when available.

outputSchema.description: The phone verification result returned by Veriphone.
